text:
Cop Morty was an alternate version of Morty Smith who appeared in the episode, "The Ricklantis Mixup". He was a police officer in The Citadel and was Cop Rick's senior partner before being killed by him.

Cop Morty had seemingly been a police officer at the Citadel of Ricks for a long period. Before meeting Cop Rick, he used to have another Rick as his partner. It is implied this previous Rick was unwilling to follow Cop Morty's corrupted ways and was killed as a result, likely by Big Morty and his gang.

He later meets Cop Rick and the two begin investigating a Morty gang known as the Mortytown Locos. Cop Morty attempted to question some nearby Mortys, who mocked him for being Cop Rick's "sidekick". In response, Cop Morty put a gun in one of their mouths and threatened to kill them, which prompted the two Mortys to give up information. When Cop Morty and Rick followed this intel, they found the Mortytown Loco's hideout and arrested them for making Bootleg Portal Fluid. During the investigation, Cop Rick is stabbed by one of the gang members, but is catered to by Cop Morty. Whilst Cop Rick waited outside, Cop Morty destroyed the entire Mortytown Loco hideout, killing all of the Mortys inside it. When his actions were questioned by Cop Rick, Cop Morty brushed it off as just "The same old story; Mortys killing Mortys".

The two then went to The Creepy Morty to meet with Big Morty, where Cop Morty reported the Mortytown Locos had suffered an "accident" and would no longer cause any trouble. He attempted to take a bribe from Big Morty, to which Cop Rick refused. This caused a gunfight to break out, which ended with Cop Morty holding a gun to Big Morty's head. Cop Rick attempted to stop his partner from killing Big Morty. Cop Morty then seemingly broke down, admitting he no longer wanted to live on the Citadel anymore. This made Cop Rick lower his gun. Seizing his chance, Cop Morty executed Big Morty before attempting to shoot Cop Rick, who killed him before he could do so.

Cop Rick then exited The Creepy Morty and turned himself in. When asked what happened, he said it was the "Same old story; Ricks killing Mortys". Following Evil Morty's seize of power over the Citadel, Cop Morty's body was seen floating through space alongside other purged Ricks and Mortys.

Cop Morty was abrasive in personality and incredibly jaded from the chaos and destruction that populates the Citadel. He totally dismisses any idea of acting in accordance to "protocol," instead preferring to insult, strong-arm and manipulate his way into achieving the outcomes he desires- even if it means threatening or murdering alleged perpetrators in order to avoid formalities and the bureaucratic process of a fair trial. He tries to instil this same state of mind into his partner, Cop Rick, through trying to convince him that colluding with Big Morty (an implied drug-lord or dealer of illicit goods), and enforcing Big Morty's rules on chaotic or unruly Morty gangs is the best way to maintain order.

Cop Morty's personality is further explored in high-stakes moments. He is seen panicking for the one and only time when Big Morty brings up his old partner and claims he is "fucking things up for the both of us". After the ensuing gun fight, when Cop Morty is held at gunpoint by Cop Rick, he shows a manipulative side by feigning an emotional breakdown, claiming he doesn't want to be a cop or live on the citadel any more. This façade quickly fades, however, and he is quickly executed by Cop Rick before he can kill him.
